metadata.title: SDXL Base + Refiner Two-Stage Workflow (Step Split Method)
metadata.description: Complete SDXL pipeline: Base generates global composition (steps 0-39), Refiner enhances details (steps 40-49). Uses KSampler Advanced for precise step control.
metadata.author: comfyui-learning

nodes.title: SDXL Base Model
nodes._comment: Load SDXL Base checkpoint (~6.9GB). This is the primary generation model.

nodes.title: SDXL Refiner Model
nodes._comment: Load SDXL Refiner checkpoint. Specialized for high-frequency detail enhancement.

widgets_values: a majestic snow leopard resting on a rocky mountain cliff at golden hour, highly detailed fur texture, dramatic lighting, cinematic composition, 8k photography
a majestic snow leopard resting on a rocky mountain cliff at golden hour, highly detailed fur texture, dramatic lighting, cinematic composition, 8k photography
nodes.title: Base Positive (SDXL Conditioning)
nodes._comment: SDXL-specific encoding with micro-conditioning. width/height=c_size (apparent resolution), crop_w/h=c_crop (0,0=no crop), target=c_ar (bucket size). text_g=OpenCLIP-bigG prompt, text_l=CLIP-L prompt.

widgets_values: blurry, low quality, deformed, ugly, oversaturated
blurry, low quality, deformed, ugly, oversaturated
nodes.title: Base Negative (SDXL Conditioning)
nodes._comment: Negative prompt for base. SDXL needs lighter negative prompts than SD1.5.

nodes.title: Empty Latent (1024×1024)
nodes._comment: SDXL native resolution. Generates latent of shape [1, 4, 128, 128].

nodes.title: Base KSampler (Steps 0-39)
nodes._comment: Base model runs first 40 of 50 steps (80%). add_noise=enable (initial noise), end_at_step=40 (stop early), return_with_leftover_noise=enable (keep remaining noise for refiner). CFG=6.5 (SDXL sweet spot, lower than SD1.5's 7-8).

widgets_values: a majestic snow leopard resting on a rocky mountain cliff at golden hour, highly detailed fur texture, dramatic lighting, cinematic composition, 8k photography
nodes.title: Refiner Positive (Aesthetic Score = 6.0)
nodes._comment: Refiner uses only OpenCLIP-bigG (one text input). ascore=6.0 guides toward high aesthetic quality. Higher=more polished but fewer training samples existed.

nodes.title: Refiner Negative (Aesthetic Score = 2.5)
nodes._comment: Negative for refiner. ascore=2.5 pushes away from low-quality aesthetics.

nodes.title: Refiner KSampler (Steps 40-49)
nodes._comment: Refiner continues from step 40 to 50 (last 20%). CRITICAL: add_noise=disable (don't re-noise!), start_at_step=40 (continue from base), return_with_leftover_noise=disable (final output). Uses same seed and total steps as base.

nodes.title: Decode Base (Preview)
nodes._comment: Optional: preview base-only output for comparison.

nodes.title: Decode Refined
nodes._comment: Decode the refined output. Uses base's VAE (same as refiner's - they share the VAE).

workflow_design_notes.step_split_explanation: Base runs 0-39 (80%), Refiner runs 40-49 (20%). This is the standard 80/20 split recommended by Stability AI. The latent passes directly from base to refiner without VAE decode/encode.
workflow_design_notes.why_disable_add_noise: Refiner receives partially-denoised latent from base. Adding noise again would destroy the base's work. The leftover noise IS the signal for the refiner.
workflow_design_notes.aesthetic_score_guide: Positive ascore=6.0 (higher=more polished, 6-8 safe range). Negative ascore=2.5 (lower=less aesthetic). These were the training conditioning values.
workflow_design_notes.cfg_note: SDXL works best with CFG 5-7. Above 8 often causes oversaturation. SD1.5 users should lower their usual CFG.
workflow_design_notes.alternative_ratios: Try 70/30 (end_at_step=35/start=35) for more refinement, or 90/10 for minimal refiner touch.
